text.div:
This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include these codes as defined in http://snomed.info/sct
    CodeDisplay
    268910001Patient's condition improved (finding)
    359746009Patient's condition stable (finding)
    271299001Patient's condition worsened (finding)
    709137006Patient condition undetermined (finding)
  • Include these codes as defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/CodeSystem/snomed-requested-cs
    CodeDisplay
    USCRS-352236Cancer in complete remission(finding)
    USCRS-352237Cancer in partial remission (finding)

name: ConditionStatusTrendVS
title: Condition Status Trend Value Set
description: How patient's given disease, condition, or ability is trending.
